completed_research: Analysis of 8+ open-source implementations: pi, pi-llm-wiki, memfabric, cortex-memory, etc.
Best practices: three-layer model, hybrid recall, trajectory capture → distillation
created_artifacts: wiki/concepts/agent-memory-management.md — comprehensive design document with architecture, implementation phases
scripts/memory/recall.sh — PRF-enhanced two-stage recall engine (Stage 1: links-first ranking + Stage 2: content expansion)
scripts/memory/hot-cache-update.sh — check-only mode optimization for hot cache rebuilds
process-query.json updated — all wiki-search.sh calls replaced with recall.sh, step_0.25 uses check-first approach
architecture_decisions: Background processing via hooks (not inline memory ops)
Separation of concerns: query/ingest/lint → content; memory layer → storage/recall/distillation
Zero dependencies: all implemented via scripts in scripts/memory/
recall.sh uses wiki-search.sh as lexical backbone + PRF boost for semantic expansion
